text.tspan: Net trade of food products as a share of domestic supply, 2021
Net exported tonnes of food products expressed as a share of domestic supply. This includes items primarily
intended for human consumption, but some may also be used for non-food purposes such as biofuels or
animal feed. Positive values mean that countries are net exporters and negative values mean they are net
Data source: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2023)
